title: EIA Monthly Plant Inventory Operating JSON API
description:
List of operating power plants in the United States and their characteristics from the Energy Information Administration (EIA). Notably, this dataset allows for exporting via the gs_entity_id, enabling the ability to pull historical data for specific units back to 2016.

This data is updated on a monthly basis and lagged by several weeks for the previous month. This data does not include retired or planned power plants.
